text: Walking from the quiet corridor into the vibrant R+D exhibition, I sense the contrast between controlled order and creative chaos. The empty, glass-lined space behind me felt sterile, almost clinical, while here the walls are alive with color and ideas. The words on the screen speak of anticipation and longing, and I resonate with that: everywhere I go becomes a border between silence and expression. I feel both curiosity and a gentle unease, wondering how technology shapes our connection to each other and to the world.
